name: Yorkshire Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and salt slightly with a fork.
2. Gradually add the flour, beating continuously.
3. Slowly add the milk until the mixture is smooth.
4. Add more milk to achieve a batter consistency similar to a thin pancake batter.
5. Cover and let stand for 1 hour.
6. Heat 2 tablespoons of beef fat in an oven-safe baking pan.
7. Pour the batter onto the hot fat.
8. Bake for 20 minutes at 425°F (220°C) in the oven.
Perfect accompaniment to Rib Roast!
